build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.longDescription: Loopwright runs a model-agnostic actor-critic loop that orchestrates autonomous coding agents, with a desktop shell over the headless engine.
